description: TOCTOU race condition via access() + fopen() without locking

sast_findings.message: access(): This usually indicates a security flaw. If an attacker can change anything along the path between the call to access() and the file's actual use, the attacker can exploit the race condition (CWE-362/CWE-367).

threat_context.title: Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization ('Race Condition')
